title: Jens Zeidler
text: Home * People * Jens Zeidler Jens Zeidler [1] Jens Zeidler , a German computer scientist, alumnus of the Chemnitz University of Technology with research interests in artificial intelligence , computer chess, Fuzzy Logic and machine learning . Currently, Jens Zeidler works at Freie Presse . Contents 1 Selected Publications 1.1 1993 ... 1.2 2000 ... 2 External Links 3 References Selected Publications [ edit ] [2] 1993 ...
